title: ICEPAPA, 12 Pencil Cases to paint and 12 Stackable Crayons for kids (7 colors in 1), perfect for crayons party bag fillers and kids' party favours
features: 【Graffiti Fabric Bag Set】This set includes 12 fabric bag for painting and 12 stackable crayons for kids. Each fabric bag is printed with different pattern, the patterns are as shown and there are no duplicates. Each crayon consists of small independent crayons in 7 different colors, which makes it easy to meet a child's painting needs with just one crayon

【Kids colouring sets】The size of the pencil case zipper pouch is 21 cm * 12 cm, with four colors of zipper, red, blue, yellow and green, 3 pieces of each. The fabric bag is made of non-woven fabric, is easy to color and is suitable for storing normal school supplies, a good choice for kids party bags pre filled for boys and girls

【Multi-color crayon】Length of each crayon 14.2cm, suitable for children to grip, and easy to carry. This crayon is not only suitable for drawing, but also for making different models with your child's imagination, which is very helpful for developing drawing skills and creativity. Crayons with seven colors in one reduce the mess and coloring without getting your hands dirty

【Creative kids party favours】The fabric bag for painting with pre-printed motifs is a big hit with children. In combination with the stacking crayons for kids, the children can easily color in the patterns and have a sense of achievement while coloring, ideal for gift bags for kid‘s party favors, return gifts and give aways for children's birthdays

【Quality and Service Guarantee】If you have any questions or dissatisfaction with the product, please feel free to contact us, you will receive a replacement or money back. WARNING: Not suitable for children under 36 months. Contains small parts, choking hazard

Childhood should be as colorful as these colored pencils! Let your imagination and creativity run wild! Design your own unique pencil case! Product features Product contains 12 pencil cases for painting + 12 stackable wax crayons Crayons colors Wax crayons 7 colors in 1: red, green, yellow, blue, purple, pink and orange. Crayons size 14.2 cm Case color White Zipper case color 4 colors: red, yellow, blue and green (3 of each color). Pencil case size 12cm*21cm Pencil case pattern There are both sea creatures and forest animals such as: dolphins, whales, rays, octopuses, dinosaurs, elephants, giraffes, sloths as well as cute puppies, rabbits, hedgehogs and snails. What fun patterns does this pencil case for children to paint contain? There are both sea creatures and forest animals such as: dolphins, whales, rays, octopuses, dinosaurs, elephants, giraffes, sloths as well as cute puppies, rabbits, hedgehogs and snails. Can this product be used as a children's birthday party favor? Of course, because this pencil case has both a cute pattern and matching fun stackable wax crayons, making it ideal for craft sets, children's birthday party favors, children's birthday giveaways. Is the pre-printed pattern on this pencil case for painting one-sided or double-sided? This pencil case for painting is printed on one side. You can color in on one side of the pattern and do your own crafts on the blank side. Why do we use these stackable wax crayons that match these pencil cases for painting? Not only can these crayons be used to color and stack fun models based on the children's creative ideas, but it is also creative and practical if each child at the children's party has a colorful crayon and a pencil case. Will I get my hands dirty with these crayons? These crayons don't get your hands dirty so easily and are multi-colored in one piece, so they are easy to transport, making them perfect for travel-loving parents who want to give their children a little gift!
